metadata.title: WohinMedizin.at — Know where to go for health questions.
metadata.description: WohinMedizin.at helps you understand your symptoms, identify the right medical specialty, and find suitable healthcare providers in Austria.

hero.heading: Know where to go for
hero.description: WohinMedizin.at helps you understand your symptoms, identify the right medical specialty, and find suitable healthcare providers in Austria.

items.title: No diagnosis
items.text: WohinMedizin.at explains and contextualises. Medical diagnosis remains with your doctor.

items.title: Reviewed content
items.text: Medical content is editorially reviewed, sourced, and regularly updated.

items.title: Privacy-friendly
items.text: Much content is available without registration. No advertising based on your health inputs.

items.title: Austrian context
items.text: Kassenarzt, Wahlarzt, referral — all content refers to the Austrian health system.

howItWorks.heading: How WohinMedizin.at works
howItWorks.subheading: Three steps from uncertainty to orientation — without diagnostic promises.

steps.title: Enter your concern or question
steps.text: Briefly describe your concern. The WohinMedizin Navigator helps with categorisation.

steps.title: Receive clear guidance
steps.text: You receive possible specialties, relevant content, and questions for your next medical appointment.

steps.title: Find your next step
steps.text: Contact points, specialists, and reviewed information — all at a glance.

specialtiesSection.heading: Medical specialties explained simply
specialtiesSection.subheading: When is which specialty relevant? Which contact point fits your concern?

items.name: General Practice
items.sub: First point of contact for unclear symptoms

rareSection.heading: When the path is longer, better guidance is needed.
rareSection.text: When symptoms remain unresolved for a long time, WohinMedizin Rare consolidates information, specialised contact points, and questions for your next medical appointment.

faqsSection.heading: Common health questions
faqsSection.subheading: Understandable answers to common uncertainties about the Austrian health system.

items.q: Public vs private doctor — the difference
When to seek urgent medical help?

forDoctorsSection.heading: Visible where medical guidance is sought.
forDoctorsSection.description: WohinMedizin.at connects reviewed health information with specialist profiles. Present your areas of focus, services, and practice details where people actively seek guidance on symptoms and specialties.

profiles.label: Specialist profile Plus
profiles.detail: Visibility in relevant articles and topics

partnerNote: Some topic areas are supported by partners. Editorial responsibility lies with WohinMedizin.at. Partner content is clearly labelled and does not influence guidance results.

footer.tagline:
Know where to go
for health questions.
footer.copyright: © 2026 WohinMedizin.at. No diagnosis. No medical advice.

navigator.label: Navigator
navigator.heading: Where should I turn?
navigator.description: Describe your concern — we'll show you possible first points of contact. No diagnosis, no judgement. Initial orientation.
navigator.placeholder: e.g. I've had headaches for two weeks, especially in the mornings. Sometimes dizziness too.
navigator.inputHint: Please describe in German or English
navigator.noStorage: Your input is not stored. No diagnosis, no automated medical decision. Sponsorship does not influence results.

specialist.appointmentHeading: What to Expect at Your Appointment
specialist.insuranceNote: Please bring any existing medical reports, a current medication list, and your e-card to your first appointment. For questions about costs and reimbursement, please contact the practice directly.
specialist.profileDisclaimer: This profile is provided by WohinMedizin.at. The information is based on details provided by the provider. WohinMedizin.at accepts no liability for accuracy or completeness. This profile does not replace medical consultation.
